text:
--- Page 1 ---
Self-Certification under preference to Make in India order Certificate 
 
In line with Government Public Procurement Order No. P-45021/2/2017-PP (BE-II) dated 
16.09.2020 and its amendments, we hereby certify that we M/s: ZENPAQ COMPUTERS AND 
PERIPHERALS are Class-I/Class-II local supplier meeting the requirement of minimum local 
content i.e.21% as defined in above orders for the material against Tender Enquiry No 
GEM/2026/B/7319588 location at which local value addition will be made as follows: 
Following documents are to be submitted as Annexure to this certification in technical 
offer/ Part-I bid: 
 
i. 
Local Component list: i.e. Items and services which are being procured / 
produced domestically by supplier in the system / equipment / service offered 
against tender. This list shall include all the components, raw materials, sub 
services etc. 
S.no. 
Description 
Local content Percentage 
01 
MEMORY 
10% 
02 
Assembling manufacturing  
 11% 
03 
  
 
ii. 
Foreign/Imported Component list: i.e. Items and services which are being 
supplied by bidder from outside India in the system / equipment / service 
offered against tender. This list shall include all the components, raw materials 
sub services etc. 
S.no. 
Description 
Foreign content Percentage 
01 
CHASIS/MOTHER BOARD, PROCESSOR, 
KEY BOARD, MOUSE, DISPLAY, CABLES. 
79% 
  
iii. 
Location(s) details from where foreign / imported components are being 
supplied also provided. 
S.no. 
Description 
Component supply location 
01 
 
02 
. 
03 
 
 Please Note that the services such as transportation, insurance, installation, 
commissioning, training and after sales support like AMC/CMC, etc shall not 
be considered for local value addition.

--- Page 2 ---
Declaration: 
We also understand, false declarations will be in breach of the code of integrity under rule 
175(1) if the General Financial Rules for which a bidder or its successors can be debarred for 
up to two years as per Rule 151(iii) of the General Financial Rules along with such other 
actions as may be permissible under law. 
 
 
Thanking You 
Signature with date: Name: D.P. NAIDU 
Designation: C E O 
Official Seal 
 
 
For ZENPAQ COMPUTERS & PERIPHERALS 
 
 
AUTHORISED SIGNATORY
